name: A Wedding and a Murder
overview: Examine the true stories of engagements, weddings, and picture-perfect honeymoons that went from joyous celebration to untimely death.  Each episode exposes a grisly homicide set against the backdrop of what appears to be wedded bliss.

trailers.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Preview - A Divine Death (Episode 1) | Oxygen
A Wedding and a Murder: Exclusive Series Premiere - Premieres on June 3 at 8/7c | Bravo
